title: Selling Online Courses Without Podia or Teachable Using Crypto: What Actually Works When You Are in a Restricted Country
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip do not work in your country. That is a platform problem, not a you problem. Here is what actually works.

content.text: Having a great online course to sell is only half the battle, especially when you are in a country where platforms like Podia or Teachable are not available due to payment restrictions, leaving you wondering how to get paid for your digital products, and the frustration of having a product but being blocked from collecting payment is a common problem for many creators in restricted countries, where traditional payment platforms like PayPal or Stripe are not accessible, and this is where crypto-native infrastructure comes into play, offering a solution to this problem
What You Are Actually Comparing

When looking for alternatives to traditional platforms, it's essential to understand what you are comparing, and in this case, it's the ability to sell digital products without relying on platforms like PayPal or Stripe, which are often not available in many countries, and this is where platforms like Unchained Commerce come in, offering a range of tools and solutions to help creators sell their products and get paid, and it's crucial to evaluate these options based on their ability to provide a seamless payment experience, automated delivery, and real-time analytics
Where the Traditional Platforms Break Down

Traditional platforms like Podia or Teachable break down when it comes to creators in restricted countries, where payment options are limited, and this is due to the compliance decisions and fraud risk tiers that these platforms have in place, which often exclude creators from certain countries, and this is where crypto-native infrastructure has an advantage, as it does not have the same geographic compliance layer, allowing creators to sell their products and get paid without restrictions

Crypto-native infrastructure does things differently by providing a decentralized and automated way of selling digital products, without the need for traditional payment processors, and this is achieved through the use of blockchain technology and cryptocurrencies, which enable fast and secure transactions, and with tools like Core Shop Engine, Web3 Wallet Connect, and Admin Dashboard, creators can set up their own stores and start selling their products without relying on third-party platforms
The reality is that traditional payment platforms like PayPal or Stripe are not available in many countries, and this is a significant barrier for creators who want to sell their digital products

The real cost difference between traditional platforms and crypto-native infrastructure lies in the fees and the level of control that creators have over their sales and payments, and with crypto-native infrastructure, creators can keep more of their earnings, as transaction fees are lower, and they have full control over their stores and payments, and this is a significant advantage, especially for creators who are just starting out or have limited budgets

The choice between traditional platforms and crypto-native infrastructure ultimately depends on the specific needs and goals of the creator, but for those in restricted countries, crypto-native infrastructure is often the only viable option, and with its decentralized and automated nature, it provides a more secure and reliable way of selling digital products, and with the right tools and solutions, creators can set up their own stores and start selling their products without restrictions

For creators in Nigeria or other restricted countries, selling digital products without PayPal is a challenge that can be overcome with crypto-native infrastructure, and the best PayPal alternative is often a platform that provides a seamless payment experience and automated delivery, and as for using Gumroad without a PayPal account, it's not possible, but with crypto-native infrastructure, creators can sell their products and get paid without relying on traditional payment processors, and getting paid online without Stripe is also possible with the right tools and solutions, and this is where Unchained Commerce comes in, offering a range of tools and solutions to help creators sell their products and get paid
